## 🌡️ Celsius to Fahrenheit Conversion

$$F = (C \times \tfrac{9}{5}) + 32$$

| Input (°C) | Calculation | Result (°F) |
|---|---|---|
| **37°C** | (37 × 9/5) + 32 = 66.6 + 32 | **98.6°F** |

**37°C = 98.6°F** — which is also the average normal human body temperature! 🩺
